tasks.description: Fix activity page 'Unknown' user display — change page.tsx .select("*") to .select("*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)"). Also add IMP-018 empty state guidance text in activity-view.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: Initial load activity entries show user email (not 'Unknown') — same data shape as Load More entries from API route
Both page.tsx server query and route.ts API query use identical .select() shape
IMP-018: Activity empty state shows guidance hint below 'No activity yet': text like 'Actions like creating steps, adding comments, and completing runbooks appear here.'

patterns_to_follow: API route already has the correct join: .select("*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)") — page.tsx must match this exact string
activity-view.tsx already accesses entry.users?.email with optional chaining — no view changes needed for BUG-019 itself

Empty state pattern: use

with text-[12px] text-[var(--text-tertiary)] mt-1 below the main message
learnings_relevant: Server/API query mismatch: When page uses both server component (page.tsx) and API route, BOTH must use same .select() shape — see LEARNINGS.md
apiFetch unwraps envelope — client functions return T directly

tasks.special_instructions:
BUG-019 attempt 3 — see DIAGNOSES.md for full root cause analysis. Attempt 1 (iter 92) fixed wrong file (route.ts). Attempt 2 (iter 94) fixed correct file but code lost in merge. The fix is ONE LINE: page.tsx line 25 .select("*") → .select("*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)"). Do NOT touch route.ts — it already has the correct join. IMP-018: Add guidance

below 'No activity yet' in the empty state block in activity-view.tsx.

tasks.description: FEAT-051 [2/2] — Coloring panel UI in canvas toolbar (paintbrush icon), rule CRUD, step node background tint (15% opacity), plus HEX_COLOR_REGEX validation on POST/PATCH API routes.
acceptance_criteria: Coloring panel component accessible via paintbrush icon button in canvas toolbar (canvas-view.tsx)
Panel lists existing rules with color swatch, criteria type, criteria value, active toggle
Add rule form: name, color (hex input), criteria_type dropdown, criteria_value input, save button
Edit and delete existing rules inline or via controls
Rules evaluated client-side in position order — last match wins
Step nodes show matching rule's color as background tint at 15% opacity
Steps matching no rule show default background (var(--bg-surface))
Coloring applies to process canvas step nodes only (not journey touchpoints/stages)
Rules apply in real-time as created/edited
POST route validates color with HEX_COLOR_REGEX (/^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/)
PATCH route validates color with HEX_COLOR_REGEX when color field is present
PATCH route validates criteria_type against VALID_CRITERIA_TYPES when criteria_type field is present

similar_files: src/app/api/v1/perspectives/route.ts — has HEX_COLOR_REGEX pattern to copy (IMP-001)
src/components/canvas/step-node.tsx — existing style prop pattern for heatMapMode background tint: style={{ backgroundColor: `${maturityColor}15` }}
src/components/panels/annotation-panel.tsx — panel component pattern in canvas context
patterns_to_follow: Step node background tint: step-node.tsx line 49 uses style={{ backgroundColor: `${maturityColor}15` }} for heatMapMode — same pattern for coloring rule tint, but ONLY when heatMapMode is off (coloring rules should not override heatmap)
StepNodeData in canvas.ts needs new optional field (e.g., coloringTint?: string) for the matched rule color
canvas-view.tsx fetches coloring rules via fetchColoringRules(workspaceId), evaluates rules against each step, passes tint color into node data
Client functions already exist in lib/api/client.ts: fetchColoringRules, createColoringRule, updateColoringRule, deleteColoringRule

Rule evaluation: iterate rules in position order, check criteria_type match — last matching rule wins. Criteria types: status (step.status === criteria_value), executor (step.executor === criteria_value), maturity_below (step.maturity_score !== null && step.maturity_score < parseInt(criteria_value)), maturity_above (step.maturity_score !== null && step.maturity_score > parseInt(criteria_value)), has_role (check step-roles — may need additional data fetch or skip for now)
Use Radix UI components for dropdowns/selects in the panel

tasks.special_instructions: Data layer already built in iter 94 (migration 019, types in database.ts, API routes, client wrappers). This task is UI + API validation fixes. Key details: (1) Rule evaluation is position-ordered, last match wins. (2) Step node tint is 15% opacity of rule hex color. (3) Coloring panel should be a popover/dropdown from a toolbar paintbrush button — keep it lightweight, not a full side panel. (4) Only process canvas steps (not journey touchpoints/stages). (5) HEX_COLOR_REGEX must be added to BOTH route.ts POST and [id]/route.ts PATCH. (6) PATCH also needs criteria_type validation — add VALID_CRITERIA_TYPES import or define locally (already defined in route.ts). (7) When heatMapMode is active, heatMap colors should take precedence over coloring rules.

shared_files.note: Both database.ts and client.ts are read-only this iteration — FEAT-051 [1/2] already added types and client functions in iter 94. Slot 2 modifies canvas.ts (StepNodeData) but not database.ts.

testing_plan.regression_reason: Risk score 6 from iter 94 triggers testing_only iter 97 with full regression + acceptance for FEAT-050, FEAT-051, BUG-019. This iter (96) focuses on building.

warnings_added: Accessibility cadence severely overdue (last audit iter 21, now iter 96 — 75 iterations). Schedule after Phase 4 testing gate.
Iter 97 MUST be testing_only: regression + acceptance for FEAT-050, FEAT-051, BUG-019 (risk score 6 from iter 94)
